title: Vanilla Vision
body:
![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/932977045225472030/1013500801957777559/2022-08-28_11.21.png)

# VanillaVisionTetxure

## Features

- Bushy Leaves                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
- 3D Itens (Not all of them)                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
- Dirt, Stone, Cobblestone, Endstone... variations                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
- Glowing Ores                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
- Custom GUI                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
- Beacon beam fix                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
- 32x resolution text                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
- Altenative Spyglass                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
- Quieter sounds                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
- Alternative Boss bar                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
- Rainbow xp bar                                                                                                                                                                                 
- Flowers variations                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
And many more!!

![](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1005574776095514786/1116402181222977536/2023-06-08_13.22.43.png)

## By VoidARH                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
This pack was made with [VanillaTweaks](vanillatweaks.net/), with significant changes for the better.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
Make sure to follow to stay up to date on the pack progress!                                                                                                                         

**IN PROGRESS**

# Features

Want to use the pack on fabric? Use this mods to do so:
> [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)                                                                                                                         
> [OptiGui](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui/)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
> [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity/)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
> [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium/)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
> [Animatica](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatica/)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
> [LambdaBetterGrass](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdabettergrass/)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
> [Colormatic](https://modrinth.com/mod/colormatic)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
> [EntityTextureFeatures](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
> [CEM](https://modrinth.com/mod/cem)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
> [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)
